description_long: This electric drill features a cylindrical body with a robust, industrial design, primarily colored in matte black and metallic bronze. The upper section is encased in a bronze-colored housing with visible metallic fasteners, while the lower section is black with a metallic base. A prominent, angular handle extends from the top and side, likely for gripping and control, and is accented in black and bronze. The top of the drill has a metallic, ribbed component, possibly for heat dissipation or mechanical function, and a flat, textured area that may serve as a control or interface. The side of the body is marked with the text 'MH x3', suggesting a model or series identifier. The overall construction appears solid and functional, suitable for heavy-duty urban or industrial use.
description: A cylindrical, industrial electric drill with a black and bronze color scheme, featuring a prominent handle and metallic accents. The body is marked 'MH x3' and has a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cylindrical body with a bronze upper housing, black lower section, and a ribbed metallic top component, with the handle partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the angular handle extending from the top and side, as well as a flat, textured metallic area on the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the 'MH x3' marking on the black section and a clear view of the bronze housing, with the handle less prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the handle's full extension and the metallic top, with the bronze and black color contrast clearly visible.
